State 14 conflicts: 1 shift/reduce


Grammar

    0 $accept: S $end

    1 S: "a" A B "a"
    2  | "b" A B "b"

    3 A: "a" C D E

    4 B: "c"
    5  | ε

    6 C: D

    7 D: "a"

    8 E: "a"
    9  | ε


Terminals, with rules where they appear

    $end (0) 0
    error (256)
    "a" (258) 1 3 7 8
    "b" (259) 2
    "c" (260) 4

    $accept (6)
        on left: 0
    S (7)
        on left: 1 2
        on right: 0
    A (8)
        on left: 3
        on right: 1 2
    B (9)
        on left: 4 5
        on right: 1 2
    C (10)
        on left: 6
        on right: 3
    D (11)
        on left: 7
        on right: 3 6
    E (12)
        on left: 8 9
        on right: 3


State 0

    0 $accept: • S $end

    "a"  shift, and go to state 1
    "b"  shift, and go to state 2

    S  go to state 3


State 1

    1 S: "a" • A B "a"

    "a"  shift, and go to state 4

    A  go to state 5


State 2

    2 S: "b" • A B "b"

    "a"  shift, and go to state 4

    A  go to state 6


State 3

    0 $accept: S • $end

    $end  shift, and go to state 7


State 4

    3 A: "a" • C D E

    "a"  shift, and go to state 8

    C  go to state 9
    D  go to state 10


State 5

    1 S: "a" A • B "a"

    "c"  shift, and go to state 11

    $default  reduce using rule 5 (B)

    B  go to state 12


State 6

    2 S: "b" A • B "b"

    "c"  shift, and go to state 11

    $default  reduce using rule 5 (B)

    B  go to state 13


State 7

    0 $accept: S $end •

    $default  accept


State 8

    7 D: "a" •

    $default  reduce using rule 7 (D)


State 9

    3 A: "a" C • D E

    "a"  shift, and go to state 8

    D  go to state 14


State 10

    6 C: D •

    $default  reduce using rule 6 (C)


State 11

    4 B: "c" •

    $default  reduce using rule 4 (B)


State 12

    1 S: "a" A B • "a"

    "a"  shift, and go to state 15


State 13

    2 S: "b" A B • "b"

    "b"  shift, and go to state 16


State 14

    3 A: "a" C D • E

    "a"  shift, and go to state 17

    "a"       [reduce using rule 9 (E)]
    $default  reduce using rule 9 (E)

    E  go to state 18


State 15

    1 S: "a" A B "a" •

    $default  reduce using rule 1 (S)


State 16

    2 S: "b" A B "b" •

    $default  reduce using rule 2 (S)


State 17

    8 E: "a" •

    $default  reduce using rule 8 (E)


State 18

    3 A: "a" C D E •

    $default  reduce using rule 3 (A)
